title: Затоплена Обитель
description: Чорна Твань. Руїни монастиря Ключників. Друга Печатка. Фінальний вибір долі Хейзмуру.
hero_state: skin cracked like willow bark, fingers numb, breath whistles, First Seal barely holds back whispers

black_mire.hazard: green poison gas from peat chasms, First Seal field needed
black_mire.lileya_role: guides via clan markers on stone pillars, warns of quicksand
black_mire.ilia_voice: whispered, exhausted — 'If your silver dies, I die in your thoughts'

flooded_abbey.second_seal: dark bog copper, hot, rusted, fused with earth flesh
